openai.description: Primary model for comprehensive Zone Concept analysis and professional skincare strategic insights

anthropic.description: Model for professional guidance analysis and Zone Concept practitioner development insights

google.description: Model for Zone Concept framework analysis and evidence-based skincare protocol recommendations

analysis_prompts.zone_concept: Analyze the RégimA Zone Concept framework data and provide strategic recommendations for professional advancement. Focus on the three core pillars: anti-inflammatory, anti-oxidant, and rejuvenation protocols. Consider relevance scores, key technologies, professional applications, and opportunities for evidence-based development.
analysis_prompts.consciousness: Examine the RégimA organizational learning cycle data and provide insights on professional development trajectory. Analyze the current Zone integration state, professional expertise level, and organizational growth indicators to recommend strategies for advancing practitioner excellence and Zone Concept adoption.
analysis_prompts.guidance: Review the RégimA professional guidance framework and provide recommendations for practitioner development. Focus on personalized treatment approaches, evidence-based learning, treatment protocol optimization, and strategies for improving client outcomes and professional excellence.
analysis_prompts.comprehensive: Conduct a holistic analysis of the RégimA organizational learning cycle, integrating all aspects: Zone Concept framework advancement, professional development evolution, and practitioner guidance systems. Provide strategic recommendations for organizational growth, Zone integration, and industry leadership in professional skincare.
